outfit_info.outfit_description: The outfit features a cozy, layered look with a grey hooded sweater beneath a chunky navy cardigan. Light blue cargo pants add a utilitarian touch, complemented by green boat shoes. This ensemble conveys comfort and readiness for casual adventures in cooler weather.

model_attributes.body: A young, slender child stands upright with a contemplative expression.
model_attributes.pose: Standing front-facing, head slightly tilted, gazing attentively upwards into the distance.
model_attributes.background: A dramatic, volcanic landscape with glowing lava and an array of illuminated drones in the twilight sky.
